title: Flava Couture Car Air Freshener Tin - Oud Wood (Pack of 6) - Strong, Odour Eliminating Designer Perfume Inspired Car Accessories – Premium Scented Air Freshener for Men or Women - Lasts 60 Days
features: AFTERSHAVE & PERFUME INSPIRED SCENTS - Take your favourite aftershave or perfume scent with you on every journey with the Flava Couture range of aftershave & perfume inspired car scents.
FRESH CAR SCENT ANYTIME - Effortlessly enjoy a blast of freshness with Flava Car Air Freshener Tin. Pop the top place it anywhere in your car and savor the new car smell for up to 60 days.

ODOUR ELIMINATOR TECHNOLOGY - Car scents which completely eliminate odours taking you back to that new car smell and replacing it with a car perfume. It's the ultimate solution for a fresh-scented ride.
SCENT BOMBS FOR ANY SPACE - Beyond the car Flava Original Air Freshener Tins enhance any space perfect for cupboards table tops windowsills and many other locations throughout your home too.

60 DAYS LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE - Experience a car perfume that stands the test of time. Our formula last up to 60 days ensuring a strong lasting fragrance so you can drive in comfort and eliminate bad odours.
description: Simply pull back the ring on the Flava Tin, remove the lid and then replace the plastic top. Place it in your car’s cup holder, under the seat or any other suitable location in your car and enjoy a fresh smelling fragrance for up-to 60 days. Flava Tins are also perfect for cupboards, table tops, windowsills and many other locations throughout your home too.
